# HearSeek

> The world's first AI search engine for audio — search every spoken moment across podcasts, lectures, and voice notes in 160+ languages.

HearSeek transforms silent spoken data into a searchable, intelligent layer of the internet. It powers a consumer mobile app for personal audio search and an enterprise on-prem solution for media houses, broadcasters, and academic archives.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of HearSeek's AI audio search engine.
- [Consumer App](/app): Personal audio search across voice notes, lectures, podcasts, and WhatsApp clips.
- [Enterprise](/enterprise): On-prem speech intelligence for media houses, broadcasters, and institutions.
- [Creators](/creators): Tools and monetization for podcasters and creators with audio archives.
- [Demo](/demo): Live, interactive demo of HearSeek search.

## Collections

- [International Iqbal Society](/collections/iis): Flagship philosophical archive — full lecture archive, semantically searchable.
- [Diary of A CEO](/collections/diary-of-a-ceo): Deep-index of Steven Bartlett's podcast.
- [Huberman Lab](/collections/huberman-lab): Deep-index of Huberman Lab episodes.
- [Lex Fridman Podcast](/collections/lex-fridman): Deep-index of Lex Fridman conversations.
- [Modern Wisdom](/collections/chris-williamson): Deep-index of Chris Williamson's Modern Wisdom.
- [Impact Theory](/collections/tom-bilyeu): Deep-index of Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory.
- [TED](/collections/ted): Deep-index of TED talks.
- [Dhruv Rathee](/collections/dhruv-rathee): Deep-index of Dhruv Rathee explainers.
- [Think School](/collections/think-school): Deep-index of Think School business case studies.
- [BeerBiceps](/collections/beer-biceps): Deep-index of Ranveer Allahbadia's BeerBiceps.
- [Raftar](/collections/raftar): Deep-index of Raftar videos.
